title: United States First-Time / In-Person Passport Application (Form DS-11)
description: Application for a U.S. passport book and/or card using Department of State Form DS-11, the form used when an applicant must apply in person — first-time applicants, applicants under 16, and anyone whose most recent passport was lost, stolen, damaged, issued more than 15 years ago, or issued before age 16. This document describes the applicant inputs and required evidence and ends at the acceptance-facility handoff: DS-11 must be signed in person before an acceptance agent and is not mailed in. It does not submit the form; the live travel.state.gov source and the current Form DS-11 PDF are always authoritative (see verification).

authority.name: U.S. Department of State, Bureau of Consular Affairs

verification.verifiedBy: GovSchema Engineering (Standards Engineer — independent second-reviewer pass)
verification.notes: Independent second-reviewer field-by-field comparison (manual-source-review-v1 Procedure steps 2-3) against the live 'Apply for Your Adult Passport' / 'Apply for a Child's Passport Under 16' guidance and the current fillable Form DS-11 (Rev. 04-2025) — its printed instructions (extracted via pdfjs-dist page text) and its 84-widget AcroForm field set (enumerated via pdf-lib). GOV-669. See VERIFICATION.md for the full discrepancy list, the corrections to already-published fields, and the reasoning for a MAJOR (not MINOR) version bump. status advances to 'verified'; source.url corrected — the prior 'how-apply.html' URL now 404s.

fields.name: inPersonReason
fields.label: Why must you apply in person (Form DS-11)?
fields.description: DS-11 is used only when you must apply in person. first_passport = you have never been issued a U.S. passport; under_16 = the applicant is a child under 16; prior_lost_stolen_damaged = your most recent passport was lost, stolen, or damaged; prior_over_15_years = your most recent passport was issued more than 15 years ago; prior_issued_under_16 = your most recent passport was issued before you turned 16. If none apply you may be eligible to renew by mail with Form DS-82 instead (see us/dos/passport-renewal-ds82).
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section A — Eligibility to Use This Form

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name (as it should appear on the passport)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: middleName
fields.label: Middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: otherNamesUsed
fields.label: Other names you have used
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Enter all legal names previously used, including maiden name, name changes, and previous married names. The form provides space for up to two other names (Section A and Section B); leave blank if none.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 1 — List All Other Names You Have Used

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: sexMarker
fields.label: Sex marker to appear on the passport
fields.description: Per Form DS-11 (Rev. 04-2025) instructions, item 3: "You must select sex marker option 'M' (male) or 'F' (female) that corresponds with your biological sex at birth." The form's Gender field offers only these two options.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth (city and state, or city and country)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: Social Security number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Enter your 9-digit U.S. Social Security number (SSN), if you have been issued one, per 26 U.S.C. 6039E and 22 U.S.C. 2714a(f). If you have never been issued an SSN, enter all zeros ("000000000") and submit a signed, dated statement declaring under penalty of perjury that you have never been issued one (see noSsnAttestationStatement). Failure to provide an SSN or the attestation may result in denial of the application.

fields.name: noSsnAttestationStatement
fields.label: Signed statement attesting you have never been issued a Social Security number
fields.description: Required only if socialSecurityNumber is entered as all zeros. A signed and dated statement including the phrase: "I declare under penalty of perjury under the laws of the United States of America that the following is true and correct: I have never been issued a Social Security Number by the Social Security Administration." If you reside abroad, the statement must also name the foreign country of residence.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 item 5 — Social Security Number (no-SSN attestation)

fields.name: uscisANumber
fields.label: USCIS Registration A-Number (if applicable)
fields.description: Your 9-digit USCIS Alien Registration Number, if you have one. Leave blank if you do not have an A-Number.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A valid email address. Providing it authorizes DOS to send email status and travel-information messages.

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Phone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234. Providing it authorizes DOS to send text/SMS status and travel-information messages.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 1 — Primary Contact Phone Number

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Mailing address — street address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Street/RFD#, P.O. Box, or URB.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine2
fields.label: Mailing address — apartment, suite, or "in care of" (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If you do not live at the mailing address, put the name of the person who lives there and mark it "In Care Of"; if the applicant is a minor child, this must be the parent or adult registered to receive mail at this address.

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Mailing address — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: mailingAddressState
fields.label: Mailing address — state or territory
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Two-letter USPS state or territory abbreviation, e.g. CA, NY, TX.

fields.name: mailingAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Mailing address — ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. 5-digit or ZIP+4 format, e.g. 90210 or 90210-1234.

fields.name: mailingAddressCountry
fields.label: Mailing address — country (only if outside the United States)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Leave blank for a U.S. mailing address; provide the country name if your mailing address is outside the United States.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 1 — Country (if outside the United States)

fields.name: permanentAddressLine1
fields.label: Permanent address — street address (only if different from your mailing address)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Complete only if your permanent address is different from your mailing address.

fields.name: permanentAddressLine2
fields.label: Permanent address — apartment or unit (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: permanentAddressCity
fields.label: Permanent address — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: permanentAddressState
fields.label: Permanent address — state or territory
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: permanentAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Permanent address — ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: everAppliedForOrIssuedPassport
fields.label: Have you ever applied for or been issued a U.S. passport book or card?
fields.description: Gates whether the prior-passport-details fields (name printed on your most recent book/card, and its status) apply.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Ever Applied or Issued

fields.name: height
fields.label: Height
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Format: feet and inches, e.g. 5'08" (the form records height as a single field, not separate feet/inches boxes).

fields.name: hairColor
fields.label: Hair color
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: eyeColor
fields.label: Eye color
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: occupation
fields.label: Occupation
fields.description: Your occupation. Enter 'student' or 'none' if not employed.

fields.name: employerOrSchool
fields.label: Employer or school
fields.description: The name of your employer or school, if any.

fields.name: parent1FullName
fields.label: Parent/guardian 1 — full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The form collects parental information; it is required for child applicants and requested for adults. Provide at least one parent's details where known.

fields.name: parent1DateOfBirth
fields.label: Parent/guardian 1 — date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: parent1PlaceOfBirth
fields.label: Parent/guardian 1 — place of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: parent1Gender
fields.label: Parent/guardian 1 — sex marker
fields.description: F = Female, M = Male, matching the form's Parent 1 Gender field.

fields.name: parent1UsCitizen
fields.label: Parent/guardian 1 — U.S. citizen?
fields.description: Whether parent/guardian 1 is a U.S. citizen, matching the form's Parent 1 US Citizen Yes/No field.

fields.name: parent1Citizenship
fields.label: Parent/guardian 1 — country of citizenship
fields.description: Country of citizenship of the first parent, where known. Supplementary detail not itself printed as a form field; see parent1UsCitizen for the form's own Yes/No question.

fields.name: parent2FullName
fields.label: Parent/guardian 2 — full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The second parent's full name, where known.

fields.name: parent2DateOfBirth
fields.label: Parent/guardian 2 — date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: parent2PlaceOfBirth
fields.label: Parent/guardian 2 — place of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: parent2Gender
fields.label: Parent/guardian 2 — sex marker
fields.description: F = Female, M = Male, matching the form's Parent 2 Gender field.

fields.name: parent2UsCitizen
fields.label: Parent/guardian 2 — U.S. citizen?
fields.description: Whether parent/guardian 2 is a U.S. citizen, matching the form's Parent 2 US Citizen Yes/No field.

fields.name: parent2Citizenship
fields.label: Parent/guardian 2 — country of citizenship
fields.description: Country of citizenship of the second parent, where known. Supplementary detail not itself printed as a form field; see parent2UsCitizen for the form's own Yes/No question.

fields.name: parentsOrGuardiansPresentInPerson
fields.label: How many parents/guardians are appearing in person with the child?
fields.description: Applicable only for a child under 16 (inPersonReason = under_16). both = both parents/guardians are present; one = only one is present; neither = neither is present (an authorized person, e.g. a grandparent, is applying with the child). If not 'both', see parentalConsentPathway.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section D.4 — Proof of Parental Relationship (For Applicants Under Age 16)

fields.name: parentalConsentPathway
fields.label: How is the non-present parent/guardian's consent or authority documented?
fields.description: one_parent_notarized_consent_ds3053 = the absent parent's notarized written statement or Form DS-3053 consenting to issuance, dated within the last 3 months and signed/notarized the same day, with a photocopy of that parent's photo ID; second_parent_deceased = the absent parent's death certificate; sole_legal_authority_evidence = evidence of sole authority to apply (e.g. a court order granting sole legal custody, or a birth certificate listing only one parent); cannot_locate_other_parent_ds5525 = a written statement under penalty of perjury or Form DS-5525 explaining why the other parent cannot be reached; guardian_institution_consent = the child is pending adoption or in foster care under a state/institutional guardian, requiring a certified court order, an official letter of authorization, and Form DS-3053.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section D.4 — Proof of Parental Relationship (For Applicants Under Age 16)

fields.name: parentalConsentDocument
fields.label: Parental consent / custody / guardianship document
fields.description: The document corresponding to parentalConsentPathway (e.g. notarized Form DS-3053, death certificate, court order, or Form DS-5525). In some countries this consent can only be notarized at a U.S. embassy or consulate, not a local notary public; consult the live source for the current country list.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section D.4 — Proof of Parental Relationship (For Applicants Under Age 16)

fields.name: parentalAwarenessAcknowledgement
fields.label: Parent/legal guardian aware of this application (applicants ages 16-17 only)
fields.description: Applicable only if the applicant is 16 or 17 years old (not the under_16 pathway). At least one parent or legal guardian must be aware the applicant is applying for a U.S. passport; the passport authorizing officer retains discretion to request a notarized statement of consent (e.g. Form DS-3053) even at this age. Set true to acknowledge. Not applicable to adult applicants or to applicants under 16, who use parentsOrGuardiansPresentInPerson instead.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section D — Proof of Parental Awareness (For Applicants Ages 16 and 17)

fields.name: everMarried
fields.label: Have you ever been married?
fields.description: Gates the spouse and marriage-history fields below.

fields.name: spouseFullName
fields.label: Current or most recent spouse — full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full name (Last, First, Middle) of your current spouse, or your most recent spouse if no longer married.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Full Name of Current Spouse or Most Recent Spouse

fields.name: spouseDateOfBirth
fields.label: Current or most recent spouse — date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Current Spouse Date of Birth

fields.name: spousePlaceOfBirth
fields.label: Current or most recent spouse — place of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Current Spouse Place of Birth

fields.name: spouseUsCitizen
fields.label: Current or most recent spouse — U.S. citizen?
fields.description: Whether the spouse is a U.S. citizen.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Spouse US Citizen

fields.name: dateOfMarriage
fields.label: Date of marriage
fields.description: Date of your (most recent) marriage.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Date of Marriage

fields.name: divorcedOrWidowed
fields.label: Divorced or widowed?
fields.description: Whether that marriage ended in divorce or by the spouse's death.

fields.name: divorceOrWidowDate
fields.label: Date of divorce or spouse's death
fields.description: Required only if divorcedOrWidowed is true.

fields.name: emergencyContactName
fields.label: Emergency contact — full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A person not travelling with you who can be contacted in an emergency.

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressLine1
fields.label: Emergency contact — street address (optional)
fields.description: Optional.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Emergency Contact Address

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressLine2
fields.label: Emergency contact — apartment or unit (optional)
fields.description: Optional.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Emergency Contact Apartment/Unit

fields.name: emergencyContactCity
fields.label: Emergency contact — city (optional)
fields.description: Optional.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Emergency Contact City

fields.name: emergencyContactState
fields.label: Emergency contact — state (optional)
fields.description: Optional.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Emergency Contact State

fields.name: emergencyContactPostalCode
fields.label: Emergency contact — ZIP code (optional)
fields.description: Optional.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Emergency Contact Zip Code

fields.name: emergencyContactPhone
fields.label: Emergency contact — phone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234.

fields.name: emergencyContactRelationship
fields.label: Emergency contact — relationship to you
fields.description: How the emergency contact is related to you, e.g. parent, spouse, friend.

fields.name: travelDepartureDate
fields.label: Date of your trip (departure)
fields.description: Your planned departure date, YYYY-MM-DD, if you have upcoming travel. Used to gauge whether expedited service is needed.

fields.name: travelReturnDate
fields.label: Date of your trip (return)
fields.description: Your planned return date, YYYY-MM-DD, if you have upcoming travel.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Travel Return Date

fields.name: travelCountries
fields.label: Countries you plan to visit
fields.description: Countries you plan to visit on the trip, if known.

fields.name: priorPassportNameOnBook
fields.label: Name printed on your most recent passport book (if different from your current name)
fields.description: Applicable only if you have ever applied for or been issued a U.S. passport. Leave blank if you never held a passport book.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Name Printed on Your Most Recent Book

fields.name: priorPassportNameOnCard
fields.label: Name printed on your most recent passport card (if different from your current name)
fields.description: Applicable only if you have ever applied for or been issued a U.S. passport. Leave blank if you never held a passport card.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Name Printed on Your Most Recent Card

fields.name: priorPassportBookStatus
fields.label: Status of your most recent passport book
fields.description: submitting_with_application = you are submitting the book with this application; stolen = it was stolen; lost = it was lost; in_possession_expired = you still have it and it is expired. Leave blank if you never held a passport book.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Status of Book

fields.name: priorPassportCardStatus
fields.label: Status of your most recent passport card
fields.description: submitting_with_application = you are submitting the card with this application; stolen = it was stolen; lost = it was lost; in_possession_expired = you still have it and it is expired. Leave blank if you never held a passport card.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Status of Card

fields.name: priorPassportLossOrTheftDetails
fields.label: Details of the loss or theft
fields.description: Required if your most recent book or card was lost or stolen. Explain the date and location (address/city/state/country) of the loss or theft, and whether a police report was filed; attach a copy of any police report separately as citizenshipEvidence-style supporting documentation.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Application Page 2 — Circumstances of Lost/Stolen Book/Card

fields.name: citizenshipEvidenceType
fields.label: Type of citizenship evidence you will present
fields.description: us_birth_certificate = certified U.S. birth certificate with the registrar's seal; consular_report_of_birth_abroad = Form FS-240/CRBA or Certification of Birth Abroad; naturalization_certificate = Certificate of Naturalization; citizenship_certificate = Certificate of Citizenship; prior_us_passport = a full-validity, undamaged U.S. passport (may be expired). Original or certified evidence must be presented in person; it is returned to you if undamaged, unaltered, and unforged.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section D.1 — Proof of U.S. Citizenship

fields.name: citizenshipEvidence
fields.label: Evidence of U.S. citizenship (document)
fields.description: An original or certified copy of your citizenship evidence. At an acceptance facility the original is presented and a photocopy is submitted; provide as PDF, JPEG, or PNG when preparing the application. Digital or electronic evidence (e.g. a mobile birth certificate) is not accepted — physical evidence only.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section D.1 — Proof of U.S. Citizenship

fields.name: photoIdType
fields.label: Type of photo identification you will present
fields.description: drivers_license = fully valid, in-state driver's license or enhanced driver's license (not temporary or a learner's permit); government_employee_id = federal, state, or city government employee ID; military_id = U.S. military or military dependent ID; certificate_of_naturalization = Certificate of Naturalization; certificate_of_citizenship = Certificate of Citizenship; prior_us_passport = a previous or current U.S. passport book or card (valid or expired, undamaged); foreign_passport = current, valid foreign passport; matricula_consular = Matricula Consular (Mexican consular ID); permanent_resident_card = U.S. Permanent Resident Card (Green Card); trusted_traveler_id = a valid Global Entry, FAST, SENTRI, or NEXUS card; tribal_photo_id = an Enhanced Tribal Card or other Native American tribal photo ID. A photocopy of the front (and back, if information appears there) is also required. For a child applicant under 16, this field and photoIdCopy describe the ID of the parent/guardian presenting the child's application, not the child's own ID.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section D.2 — Proof of Identity

fields.name: photoIdCopy
fields.label: Photocopy of your photo identification (document)
fields.description: A photocopy of the front (and back, if information appears there) of the identification you will present, on white 8.5"x11" paper, one side only. Provide as PDF, JPEG, or PNG.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section D.2 — Proof of Identity

fields.name: photo
fields.label: Passport photo
fields.description: One color photograph meeting the published U.S. passport photo requirements (2x2 inches, taken within the last 6 months, plain white or off-white background, no digital edits or AI-generated changes). Provide as JPEG or PNG.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section D.3 — A Recent Color Photograph

fields.name: productRequested
fields.label: What are you applying for?
fields.description: book = Passport book; card = Passport card; book_and_card = Both passport book and card.

fields.name: bookSize
fields.label: Passport book size
fields.description: regular = Standard passport book; large = Large-format book with extra visa pages, for frequent international travelers. Only applicable when requesting a passport book.

fields.name: serviceSpeed
fields.label: Processing speed
fields.description: routine = Routine service; expedited = Expedited service (additional fee, faster). Current processing times and fees are published on the live source.
fields.sourceRef: How to Apply — routine or expedited service

fields.name: acceptanceFacilityAcknowledged
fields.label: Acknowledge in-person submission at an acceptance facility
fields.description: DS-11 cannot be mailed in. You must take the completed (unsigned) form and all evidence to an acceptance facility — many post offices, libraries, and clerks of court — and sign it in person before an acceptance agent, who administers the oath. Set true to acknowledge this handoff. This document ends here; the agent never submits on the applicant's behalf.
fields.sourceRef: DS-11 Section B — Steps to Apply for a U.S. Passport

steps.title: Confirm you must apply in person
